## Checklist

- [ ] I have tested the notebook end-to-end (Kernel → Restart & Run All completes without errors)
- [ ] The README for the affected project has been updated
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials are included
- [ ] Large data files are excluded (not committed — use `.gitignore`)
- [ ] Notebook outputs have been stripped before committing (`nbstripout`)
- [ ] New dependencies are added to the relevant `requirements.txt`
